---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Flint's syntax, standard library, or tooling.
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: 'enhancement'
assignees: ''
---

## The Problem
Is your feature request related to a specific problem in DevOps or scripting? Please describe.
*(e.g., "I'm always frustrated when I try to parse CSV files and there is no built-in standard library function for it.")*

## The Proposed Solution
Describe the solution you'd like. Please provide an example of how the Flint syntax would look:

```flint
# Example of the proposed feature
```

Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds using the current ~> pipeline operators or C-interop?

Additional Context
Add any other context, performance implications, or references to how other languages (Zig, Go, Python) handle this.
